svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram id="OQSgFCv-KESOGcvr2w_t" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-679" dy="-220" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1320" pageHeight="840" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#232F3E;" value="Real-Time Financial Intelligence Platform Architecture (Region: ap-south-1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="26" width="900" x="40" y="14" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="subtitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=11;fontColor=#5A6B86;" value="Write path (anomaly-gated generation) flows left to right; read path is decoupled (CQRS). Bedrock is reached via a cross-region inference profile." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="18" width="1000" x="40" y="38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#232F3E;" value="Next.js UI
(SSR)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cognito" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#DD344C;" value="Cognito User Pools
(JWT, multi-tenant)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="240" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apiws" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#8C4FFF;" value="API Gateway
(WebSocket)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="1090" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="waf" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#DD344C;" value="WAF" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="40" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="apirest" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#8C4FFF;" value="API Gateway
(REST)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="240" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="watchlist" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="Watchlist Lambda
(CRUD)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="470" y="160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="query" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="Query Lambda
(read-only cache)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="470" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eventbridge" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#E7157B;" value="EventBridge
(schedule)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="40" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="sfn" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#E7157B;" value="Step Functions
Ingestion State Machine
(Distributed Map)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="74" width="180" x="230" y="378" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="fetch" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="Fetch + Store Lambda
(provider failover)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="440" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="anomaly" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="Anomaly Lambda
(z-score gate)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="160" x="670" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="correlation" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#ED7100;" value="Correlation Lambda

(structured JSON + fallback)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="1090" y="385" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#7AA116;" value="S3 Data Lake
(cold, partitioned)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="150" x="440" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dynamo" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#3334B9;" value="DynamoDB
(single table, hot + TTL)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="230" x="660" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bedrock" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fontColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=none;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;fillColor=#01A88D;" value="Amazon Bedrock
(Claude Sonnet via
cross-region inference profile)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="1090" y="555" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="crosscut" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F2F3F3;strokeColor=#879196;fontColor=#232F3E;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=12;" value="Cross-cutting (applies to all compute)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="1230" x="40" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cw" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#879196;fontColor=#232F3E;fontSize=11;" value="CloudWatch

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #232F3E;
